task_completion.description: Create a forensic case with the specified name and case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a forensic tool (e.g., Autopsy) with an open case named 'C2_Hunting_2024' and case number 'INV-C2-010'.

task_completion.description: Add the specified disk image as a data source to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data source tree or inventory in the forensic tool showing '/home/ga/evidence/c2_evidence.dd' loaded and parsed.

task_completion.description: Configure a custom file signature for the C2 configuration files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or configuration window in the forensic tool showing a custom file type defined with the MIME type 'application/x-xyz-config' and the ASCII signature 'XYZCONF' at offset 0.

task_completion.description: Run analysis to identify files matching the custom signature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool's results tree or file listing showing discovered files categorized under the MIME type 'application/x-xyz-config' or matching the custom signature rule.

task_completion.description: Generate a pipe-delimited report of the discovered files to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, text editor, or file viewer showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/Reports/c2_discovered_configs.csv'. The content must use pipe '|' delimiters and start with the exact header 'FILENAME|EXTENSION|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MIME_TYPE'.

integrity.description: The agent used a proper forensic tool (like Autopsy) to analyze the disk image rather than just using command-line strings/grep on the raw .dd file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a forensic GUI application for configuring signatures and viewing results.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the ingest/analysis modules to find the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible progress bars, ingest module configuration, or populated result trees in the forensic tool, rather than manually searching the hex view for every file.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the file metadata from the forensic tool to build the report, rather than hallucinating or hardcoding expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen exporting a CSV from the forensic tool or writing a script that parses the tool's database/output, rather than typing out a pre-made list of files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a case named 'C2_Hunting_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-C2-010') and analyzing '/home/ga/evidence/c2_evidence.dd'. The agent must configure a custom signature 'XYZCONF' mapped to MIME type 'application/x-xyz-config'. The final output must be a pipe-delimited CSV at '/home/ga/Reports/c2_discovered_configs.csv' with the exact header 'FILENAME|EXTENSION|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MIME_TYPE'.
